# ClearSight — Full Context

> ADA/WCAG 2.1 accessibility checker — full-site crawl and scan for WCAG Level A & AA violations with AI-enriched reports.

## What it does

ClearSight audits websites for accessibility violations defined by WCAG 2.1 Level A and AA. It renders pages in a real browser (headless Chromium via Playwright), runs axe-core accessibility checks, applies custom engines for link text quality and touch target sizes, and enriches findings with AI-generated descriptions and fix suggestions via Azure OpenAI.

## How it works

1. User submits a URL via the web app or REST API
2. A BullMQ job is queued for page scanning
3. The worker renders the page with Playwright, runs axe-core, applies custom checks
4. Azure OpenAI enriches each issue with a plain-English description and fix suggestion
5. An accessibility score (0–100) is computed with severity-weighted penalties
6. Results are stored in PostgreSQL and surfaced via the UI and API

For full-site crawls, a BFS crawler discovers all pages via `<a>` links and `/sitemap.xml`, then queues each page for scanning.

## Scoring

Score starts at 100. Penalties per issue:
- Critical: -10 points
- Serious: -5 points
- Moderate: -3 points
- Minor: -1 point

Dismissed issues are excluded. Score is capped at 0.

## Tech stack

- **Frontend:** Next.js 16 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui
- **Database:** PostgreSQL 16, Prisma ORM
- **Queues:** BullMQ + Redis
- **Scanner:** Playwright 1.58 (headless Chromium), axe-core
- **AI:** Azure OpenAI (GPT-4)
- **Export:** PDFKit, ExcelJS
- **Docs:** Nextra 4

## API

Base URL: `https://clearsight.pranaygupta.in/api`

- `POST /api/scans` — scan a single page
- `GET /api/scans/:id` — get scan results
- `POST /api/sites` — create a site
- `POST /api/sites/:id/crawl` — trigger full-site crawl
- `GET /api/sites/:id/crawls/:crawlId` — get crawl results

Full API docs: https://docs.clearsight.pranaygupta.in/dev/api

## Links

- App: https://clearsight.pranaygupta.in
- Docs: https://docs.clearsight.pranaygupta.in
